channel.title: briefUpdatesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from briefUpdatesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: U.S., Mexico seize tons of cocaine in "coordinated" Pacific operation
item.description: President Trump has threatened to slap additional tariffs on Mexico to pressure the country into beefing up drug raids and cartel arrests.

item.title: WhatsApp says Russia has tried to fully block the messaging app
item.description: Russia has attempted to fully block WhatsApp as it tightens control of online communication and pushes people toward a state-backed alternative

item.title: WATCH: Couple's love story started on a boat as volunteers
item.description: ABC News' Danny New talks to Gary and Susan, who met while providing medical care aboard a hospital ship.

item.title: Video suggests DHS exaggerated claims about Chicago: Visual analysis
item.description: At no point in the video footage is a driver seen ramming the agents' vehicle.

item.title: 2/11: CBS Evening News
item.description: The search for Savannah Guthrie’s mother intensifies; In House hearing, Attorney General Pam Bondi faces heavy criticism over Epstein files release.

item.title: Gun accessory company to pay $1.75M to Buffalo mass shooting victims
item.description: The agreement with Mean Arms settles a lawsuit and covers claims from various victims' families and survivors of the 2022 attack at Tops Friendly Mark...

item.title: ULA rocket has booster problem while launching classified Space Force payloads
item.description: A United Launch Alliance Vulcan rocket carrying classified Space Force payloads suffered a booster problem but apparently made an otherwise "nominal" ...

item.title: WATCH: Top moments from AG Bondi's combative hearing on Capitol Hill
item.description: Attorney General Pam Bondi was grilled by lawmakers as she testified for several hours before the House Judiciary Committee on Wednesday.

item.title: Bondi says Ghislaine Maxwell 'will hopefully die in prison'
item.description: Attorney General Pam Bondi was on the hot seat over the controversial decision to transfer Ghislaine Maxwell to a minimum security prison.

item.title: Trump's EPA is revoking the "endangerment finding." Here's what to know.
item.description: The Trump administration says greenhouse gases emitted from sources like cars, trucks and power plants will no longer by regulated by the federal gove...

item.title: FBI combs desert terrain for clues in Nancy Guthrie’s disappearance
Few leads in Guthrie investigation after 11 days, yet cases often break unexpectedly
Pentagon let CBP use anti-drone laser before FAA closed El Paso airspace, AP sources say
item.description: The agency says it will ground all flights to and from the airport for “special security reasons.”
